html:
Exclusive to:

GenericDone

The Portable Seasoning Station is a craftable Item exclusive to Warly in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Cooking Filter, and requires two Gold Nuggets, three Cut Stones and six Twigs to craft. Just as other survivors cannot use the Portable Crock Pot, they cannot use this structure either.

Once the Portable Seasoning Station has been deployed, it allows the combination of Crock Pot Dishes with Seasonings. The seasoning process takes around 3 seconds.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Distinguished
Stoneware Crock Pot
The line between surviving and thriving lies in the richness of the flavors you savor.
Woven - Distinguished
Silver Crock Pot
Haute cuisine, on the go!
Woven - Distinguished
Cast Iron Crock Pot
Maman Angeline always favored cast iron cookware.
Woven - Distinguished
Porcelain Crock Pot
The key ingredient is charm.

GenericDone
“This will spice things up.”
–Wilson
“All that work better be worth it.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will turn grinder with his mighty muscles!”
–Wolfgang
“If only it could spice up my life.”
–Wendy
“YOU WASTE YOUR TALENTS WORKING FOR FLESHSACKS”
–WX-78
“It'll need some elbow grease.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not usually one for fancy spices.”
–Woodie
“Ah. The daily grind.”
–Maxwell
“A förmidable weapön against bad meals.”
–Wigfrid
“Oh! Can we grind it, please?”
–Webber
“Fresh spices! Oh, how I have missed you!”
–Warly
“What's it do?”
–Wormwood
“Probably a whole lot of interesting gears in there.”
–Winona
“Grind, grind, grind away.”
–Wortox
“Put flavor bits on foodthings!”
–Wurt
“A little extra flavour never hurt anyone.”
–Walter
“Some flavor might be nice, but is it worth taking the extra time?”
–Wanda
“Should make things a little tastier.”
–Wilson
“All that work for just a little bit of spice?”
–Willow
“Is little pile with mighty taste.”
–Wolfgang
“Finished.”
–Wendy
“THE I/O OPERATION HAS BEEN PERFORMED”
–WX-78
“The flavoring is ready for use.”
–Wickerbottom
“All ground up.”
–Woodie
“Finally something with some taste.”
–Maxwell
“Its task has cöme tö an end.”
–Wigfrid
“All done.”
–Webber
“Pickup! Oh, old habits...”
–Warly
“Made pile of tasty dirt”
–Wormwood
“Well worth all that work.”
–Winona
“Mortals are so strange.”
–Wortox
“All done!”
–Wurt
“Mmm, looks good!”
–Walter
“I'll admit, it does look more appetizing than it did before.”
–Wanda
The Portable Seasoning Station is a craftable Item exclusive to Warly in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Cooking Filter, and requires two Gold Nuggets, three Cut Stones and six Twigs to craft. Just as other survivors cannot use the Portable Crock Pot, they cannot use this structure either.
Once the Portable Seasoning Station has been deployed, it allows the combination of Crock Pot Dishes with Seasonings. The seasoning process takes around 3 seconds.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trạm Gia vị Di động là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền của Warly trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Nấu Ăn và cần hai Vàng Thỏi, ba Đá Cắt và sáu Cành Cây để chế tạo. Giống như những người sống sót khác không thể sử dụng Nồi Hầm Di Động, họ cũng không thể sử dụng cấu trúc này.
